title: Suggestion Engine Core
purpose: Implement governance suggestion engine to reduce operator cognitive load, proactively guide workflows, detect likely next actions, and improve governance ergonomics.
architectural_constraints: Deterministic suggestion generation with no randomness
Must suppress invalid recommendations during degraded runtime states
Every suggestion must include rationale, priority, confidence, and actionable recipe
acceptance_criteria: 6 suggestion categories operational: operational, governance, recovery, planning, deployment, investigation
Suggestions include rationale plus priority plus confidence plus recipe
No deployment suggestions during unresolved failures

traceability.description: Implemented governance suggestion engine with 6 categories, deterministic generation, degraded-state suppression, rationale, priority, confidence, and recipes

failure_modes.mitigation: Degraded-state suppression, confidence thresholds, human review gate for high-impact suggestions
